title: corybas despectans
intro: Corybas despectans, also known as the 'despectans orchid', is a type of orchid that belongs to the subfamily Thelymitrinae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corybas despectans include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in the form of tinctures and ointments for topical application.
